fileContext.overview: This file is the main entry point for the CodeAtlas extension, responsible for initializing and managing the extension's functionality, including setting up the UI, handling user interactions, and performing analysis tasks.

symbols.name: activate
symbols.purpose: Initializes the CodeAtlas extension and sets up its functionality
symbols.behavior: Creates and configures the main panel, status bar, and activity bar, and registers commands for user interactions
symbols.limitations: Must be called once when the extension is activated

symbols.name: deactivate
symbols.purpose: Cleans up and disposes of the CodeAtlas extension's resources
symbols.behavior: Disposes of the auto-update timer, server manager, and logger
symbols.limitations: Must be called when the extension is deactivated

symbols.name: setupAutoUpdate
symbols.purpose: Sets up the auto-update functionality for the CodeAtlas extension
symbols.behavior: Configures the file watcher and branch polling, and registers commands for user interactions
symbols.limitations: Must be called once when the extension is activated

symbols.name: disposeAutoUpdate
symbols.purpose: Cleans up and disposes of the auto-update resources
symbols.behavior: Clears the branch polling interval and file watcher
symbols.limitations: Must be called when the extension is deactivated

symbols.name: buildWorkflowOptions
symbols.purpose: Builds the workflow options for the CodeAtlas extension
symbols.behavior: Configures the workflow options based on the user's configuration
symbols.limitations: Must be called when running a workflow

symbols.name: handleWorkflowError
symbols.purpose: Handles errors that occur during workflow execution
symbols.behavior: Displays an error message to the user and logs the error
symbols.limitations: Must be called when an error occurs during workflow execution
